title: hieracium subtardans
intro: Hieracium subtardans, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often combined with other herbs to create teas, salves, and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual use.
